name: Eustass"Captain"Kid (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] You may rest this Character: Trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.[End of Your Turn] If your opponent has 2 or less Life cards, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
